catalog-title.Content:
Browse our full collection of books. Click any book to view details and purchase.

See [Book Catalog Help](help:book-list.md) for the full guide.

catalog-info.Content:
**Tip:** Use the genre filter to narrow results, or click a book card to visit its store page.

Learn more: [Searching & Filtering](help:search-filter.md)

genre-filter.Content:
Filter the catalog by literary genre. Select **All Genres** to see everything.

For advanced filtering tips, see [Search & Filter Guide](help:search-filter.md).

book-price.Content:
All prices are in **USD** and include tax.

See [Store Page Help → Pricing](help:store.md#pricing) for details.

stock-status.Content:
**In Stock** means the book is available for immediate purchase. **Out of Stock** items cannot be added to cart.

More info: [Store Help → Availability](help:store.md#availability)

genre-badge.Content:
Books are categorized by genre to help you find similar titles.

See the [full catalog](help:book-list.md) to browse by genre.

store-price.Content:
The listed price is the final price in **USD**, tax included.

[Pricing details](help:store.md#pricing)

store-stock.Content:
Real-time availability. Out of stock items may be restocked — check back later.

[Availability info](help:store.md#availability)

add-to-cart.Content:
Adds this book to your shopping cart. You can review your cart before checkout.

See [Store Help](help:store.md) for the full purchasing guide.

cart-info.Content:
**Shopping Cart:** Items stay in your cart until you complete checkout or remove them.

For help: [Store Guide](help:store.md) | [Book Details](help:book-detail.md)
